name: Pharmadax Inc.
summary: Pharmadax Inc. engages in the pharmaceutical research and development business in Taiwan, the Unites States, China, and internationally. It primarily focuses on the development of oral solid controlled-release technology pellets. The company offers Glyburide, Quetiapine Fumarate ER, and Metoprolol Succinate ER tablets, as well as contract development and/or contract manufacturing services for solid orals. It provides its products for a range of therapeutic areas, including schizophrenia, hypertension, diabetes, cold, Parkinson's disease, ADHD, chronic hepatitis, overactive bladder, and muscle relaxant. The company was founded in 2008 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
